queries.question: What personal protective equipment is required for architect?
queries.sql:
SELECT Safety.personalProtectiveEquipment 
FROM Safety 
    JOIN EMPLOYEE on Safety.employeeID = Employee.employeeID
WHERE Employee.position ="Architect"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?personalprotectiveequipment WHERE {
  ?safety a :Safety .
  ?employee a :Employees .
  ?safety p:hasEmployee ?employee .
  ?safety p:personalProtectiveEquipment ?personalprotectiveequipment .
  ?employee p:position ?position_f .
  FILTER(?position_f = "Architect")
}

queries.question: What personal protective equipment will Mike Johnson need?
queries.sql:
SELECT Safety.personalProtectiveEquipment 
FROM Safety 
    JOIN EMPLOYEE on Safety.employeeID = Employee.employeeID
WHERE Employee.firstName="Mike" AND Employee.lastName="Johnson"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?personalprotectiveequipment WHERE {
  ?safety a :Safety .
  ?employee a :Employees .
  ?safety p:hasEmployee ?employee .
  ?safety p:personalProtectiveEquipment ?personalprotectiveequipment .
  ?employee p:firstName ?firstname_f .
  ?employee p:lastName ?lastname_f .
  FILTER(?firstname_f = "Mike")
  FILTER(?lastname_f = "Johnson")
}

queries.question: What personal protective equipment and training programs are required for architect?
queries.sql:
SELECT Safety.personalProtectiveEquipment, trainingPrograms 
FROM Safety 
    JOIN EMPLOYEE on Safety.employeeID = Employee.employeeID
WHERE Employee.position ="Architect"

  ?safety a :Safety .

  ?safety p:personalProtectiveEquipment ?personalprotectiveequipment .
  ?safety p:trainingPrograms ?trainingprograms .

  FILTER(?position_f = "Architect")
}
